BEDROCK.summary: Legacy Bedrock Infobox/Block Bedrock is a Legendary unobtainable, unbreakable block. It can be found on the spawn point of the player's Private Island, on The Garden as a bottom border for every plot, and it will appear after mining materials on certain public islands, indicating that block cannot be mined further until it regenerates. It also appears in The End and in the Obsidian Sanctuary as a decoration, as well as within The Catacombs and the Crystal Hollows acting as a border

COMPOST.summary: Compost is obtained by using the Composter, which needs 4000 Organic Matter to make each Compost, excluding Composter Upgrades. The following table gives the Organic Matter for all known compostable items. All Organic Matter values below are exact. For example, Potatoes are worth exactly 0.33 organic matter, not 1/3. Note that Condensed Fermento and Condensed Helianthus can only be used with sufficient Composter Upgrades because they are worth more than the default limit of 40,000 Organic Matter

DARK_ORB.summary: Dungeon Reward Chests: The Dark Orb can appear in Dungeon Reward Chests on The Catacombs - Floor V.

DARK_PEBBLE.summary: The Dark Pebble can be claimed from Gunther in the Rift Dimension after completing the Rift Race in under 60s

DAVIDS_CLOAK.summary: David's Cloak be re-purchased from Rusty in case their original is lost

DCTR_SPACE_HELM.summary: A Space Helmet is rewarded to the player after completing a trade with the Spaceman on The Garden

DEAD_BUSH_OF_LOVE.summary: The Dead Bush of Love is a Special item. Players (Staff + Hypixel Player Council) who helped test Hypixel SkyBlock before its public release received this item as a token of gratitude. Only a few players were given this opportunity, which is why this item is extremely rare

DEAD_CAT_DETECTOR.summary: The Cat Detector can be claimed from a chest as part of Sad Jacquelle's quest

DEAD_CAT_FOOD.summary: Tasty Cat Food can be obtained by transferring a Dead Cat Food, which can be purchased from Barrier Street, from the Rift to the Hub

DEAD_PLANT.summary: A Dead Plant replaces plants in the Greenhouse if they reach -100 water. Alternatively, the decay mechanic will turn most fully grown mutation into Dead Plants after a few days, even if fully hydrated or placed by the player. Different mutations can have different decay timers. The lowest is 3 days, and certain mutations do not have any decay at all. This can be observed using the Plant Diagnostics Tool

DEAD_SEED.summary: A Dead Seed can be obtained by using Enchanted Bone Meal on a Dead Bush, including Red Thornleaf!Red Thornleaves on the Crimson Isle. The Enchanted Bone Meal will be consumed upon use

DEADGEHOG_SPINE.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 4 Leech Supreme Fragment, 1 Wyld Sword, 12 Deadgehog Spine; Crafting recipe: Leech Sword

DEAN_LETTER_OF_RECOMMENDATION.summary: Infobox/Item The Letter of Recommendation is a Rare Quest Item. The Dean gives the player one after being given a Maddox Batphone

DEATH_BOW.summary: A Death Bow can be purchased from Ophelia's shop for 5m once The Catacombs - Floor VI is completed at least once

DECAYED_BAT.summary: A Decayed Bat has a 100% chance to drop from shooting a Bat, spawned from a Roofed Forest Island on the player's Private Island, with a Wither Bow using Icy Arrows

DECENT_AXE.summary: Shop Purchase: A Decent Axe can be purchased from Amaury. Name: Decent Axe; Ingredients: 1 Seriously Damaged Axe, 1000000 coins

DECENT_BOW.summary: A Decent Bow can be purchased from Gregory for 500 Coins. They appear in the Dragon's Nest during Ender Dragon fights and in Jerry's Workshop when a Reindrake spawns

DECENT_COFFEE.summary: The player can purchase a Decent Coffee for 5k from the Bartender

DEEP_ROOT.summary: Deep Roots have a 4% chance to drop from Mangrove Tree Gifts on the Moonglade Marsh

DEEPFRIES.summary: Farming: Deepfries have a 0.006% chance to drop when breaking mature Potatoes, a chance to drop from a Locust and a chance to drop from a Field Mouse while the Harvest Feast is ongoing and the crop is in season

DEFECTIVE_MONITOR.summary: Once obtained, it can be re-purchased from Unhinged Kloon for 1000

DIVAN_FRAGMENT.summary: Divan Fragment is a drop from the Crystal Nucleus's Treasure Stash after obtaining and placing all 5 Gemstone Crystals. It has a 1.96% chance to be rolled as a drop

DOJO_BLACK_BELT.summary: The Black Belt can be obtained from Master Tao after reaching 7000 points in the Dojo. It is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it

DOJO_BLUE_BELT.summary: The Blue Belt is obtainable from Master Tao after reaching 4000 points in the Dojo

DOJO_BROWN_BELT.summary: The Brown Belt is an Epic Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao after reaching 6000 points in the Dojo. It gives +30 and +20. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 5%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it. It can be upgraded into the Black Belt, and is a direct upgrade from the Blue Belt

DOJO_GREEN_BELT.summary: The Green Belt is an Uncommon Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao after reaching 2000 points in the Dojo. It gives +20 and +10. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 3%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it. It can be upgraded into the Blue Belt, and is a direct upgrade from the Yellow Belt

DOJO_WHITE_BELT.summary: Infobox/Item The White Belt is a Common Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao as the first Dojo reward. It gives +10 and +5. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 0.5%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it

DOJO_YELLOW_BELT.summary: Infobox/Item The Yellow Belt is an Uncommon Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao after reaching 1000 points in the Dojo. It gives +15 and +5. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 1%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it. It can be upgraded into the Green Belt, and is a direct upgrade from the White Belt

DR_PAPER.summary: The player can purchase a Dctr. Paper for 4k from Shifty

DUNGEON_CHEST_KEY.summary: Dungeon Chest Keys can be found from secrets on Floor 4 of The Catacombs and above. The drop chance is 0.6%

DUNGEON_DISC_1.summary: The Dungeon Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_DISC_2.summary: The Clown Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_DISC_3.summary: The Watcher Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_LORE_PAPER.summary: Journals can be found laying on the floor near some bodies in dungeon rooms. When picked up, they transform into the next Journal the player does not have. If the player has collected all entries, they will instead transform into a random entry

DUNGEON_STONE.summary: A Dungeon Orb is given by Mort on every Dungeon run of The Catacombs - Floor III and below if the player does not have a Dungeon Orb in their inventory. A Dungeon Orb may also be obtained by clicking in the bottom right of the class selection screen

DUNGEON_WIZARD_CRYSTAL.summary: Infobox/Item The Wizard's Crystal is a Rare Dungeon item that can be found in The Catacombs from Floor IV to Floor VII. Once found, players can give the Wizard's Crystal to the Wizard who is located in the same room. Upon giving him the crystal, the team gains 1 Blessing of Wisdom. Returning the crystal to the Wizard does not reward a secret

DUNGEONBREAKER.summary: A Dungeonbreaker is sold by Ophelia for 500 Wither Essence. It requires The Catacombs - Floor III completion to purchase and use

DUSKBLOOM.summary: A Duskbloom can grow in the Greenhouse if there are 2 Moonflower, 2 Shadevine, 2 Sunflower and 2 Dustgrain within 1 block of farmland

DUSTGRAIN.summary: A Dustgrain can grow in the Greenhouse if there are 2 Wheat within 1 block of farmland

DWARVEN_DIAMOND_AXE.summary: Scavenged Items have a 20% chance to be obtained from Treasure Chests found in the GREATER MINES MITHRIL UBER ROOM using a Metal Detector. Having the Pet/MOLE equipped increases the chance up to 45%. When this chance is rolled, a random Scavenged Item is picked between the existing four. You cannot get a scavenger item you already have in your inventory. If you have all of them in your inventory, you won't get any

DWARVEN_OS_METALLIC_MINIS.summary: Dwarven O's Metallic Minis have a chance to drop when looting a Tungsten, Umber, or Vanguard Frozen Corpse

DWARVEN_OS_ORE_OATS.summary: Dwarven O's Ore Oats have a chance to drop when participating in Mining Events in the Dwarven Mines

DWARVEN_TANKARD.summary: To obtain the Dwarven Tankard, talk to one of the NPCs in the Dwarven Tavern and then type "burp" in the public chat (note: party chat, guild chat, and private chat will not work) - this will only be visible in chat to players who are also in the Dwarven Tavern area. A player can only receive one Dwarven Tankard

DWARVEN_TREASURE.summary: Dwarven Treasure has a chance to be obtained as a reward from participating in Dwarven Events

DYE_AQUAMARINE.summary: Aquamarine Dye has a variable chance to drop when killing Aquatic Sea Creatures. It cannot drop when Loot Sharing

DYE_ARCHFIEND.summary: An Archfiend Dye has a 0.015% (1/6,666) chance to be obtained by rolling an Archfiend Dice or a 0.15% (1/666) chance by rolling a High Class Archfiend Dice. Dye Drop Chance

DYE_BINGO_BLUE.summary: The player can purchase a Bingo Blue Dye from the shop at Bingo for 500 once the player has reached 3

DYE_BONE.summary: A Bone Dye has a 0.0000333% chance of dropping from most Skeleton-type mobs. Dye Drop Chance Drop Sources

DYE_BRICK_RED.summary: A Brick Red Dye can be obtained from killing any tier of the Tarantula Broodfather. The drop chance depends on what tier of the slayer boss is killed

DYE_BYZANTIUM.summary: A Byzantium Dye can be obtained from killing any tier of the Voidgloom Seraph. The drop chance depends on what tier of the slayer boss is killed

DYE_CARMINE.summary: Aquamarine Dye has a variable chance to drop when killing Magmatic Sea Creatures. It cannot drop when Loot Sharing

DYE_CELADON.summary: A Celadon Dye has a 1/10,000 chance of dropping when defeating Bacte. Additionally, it has a 1/100,000 chance of dropping when killing a Blobbercyst, which spawns after destroying one of Bacte's tentacles during the boss fight

DYE_CELESTE.summary: Celeste Dye has a chance to be obtained from defeating a Sven Packmaster. Slayer Tier: I; Chance: 1/10,000,000. Slayer Tier: II; Chance: 1/2,500,000. Slayer Tier: III; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Slayer Tier: IV; Chance: 1/500,000

DYE_CHOCOLATE.summary: The player can purchase one Chocolate Dye every SkyBlock Year from the Chocolate Shop for 40b, providing their Chocolate Factory is at least level 6

DYE_COPPER.summary: Copper Dye can be obtained by completing offers for Visitors on The Garden. The drop chance depends on the Rarity of the Visitor

DYE_CYCLAMEN.summary: A Cyclamen Dye has a variable chance of dropping from all mobs in the Crimson Isle. The mobs affected, and associated drop chances, are:

DYE_DARK_PURPLE.summary: A Dark Purple Dye has a base 1/400 or 0.25% chance of appearing in Rounds 1, 3, or 4 of the Dark Auction with a starting price of 20m

DYE_DUNG.summary: Dung Dye has a 0.0002% chance to be obtained when vacuuming any Pest on The Garden. 0.0002

DYE_EMERALD.summary: The player has a 1/5,000,000 chance of obtaining an Emerald Dye from mining Emerald Ore or Pure Emerald

DYE_FLAME.summary: A Flame Dye has a variable chance of dropping from defeating an Inferno Demonlord. Slayer Tier: I; Chance: 1/10,000,000. Slayer Tier: II; Chance: 1/2,500,000. Slayer Tier: III; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Slayer Tier: IV; Chance: 1/500,000

DYE_FOSSIL.summary: Fossil Dye has a 1/500,000 chance to be obtained from excavating a Suspicious Scrap. This chance can be increased by up to 10% from the Prehistorian perk in the Fossil Essence Shop

DYE_FROSTBITTEN.summary: Frostbitten Dye has a chance to be obtained from looting Frozen Corpses. Corpse Tier: Lapis; Chance: 1/250,000. Corpse Tier: Umber; Tungsten; Chance: 1/100,000. Corpse Tier: Vanguard; Chance: 1/10,000

DYE_HOLLY.summary: A Holly Dye has a base 0.0125% chance of appearing in a Red Gift. Both the gifting player and recipient receive the item

DYE_ICEBERG.summary: The Iceberg Dye can be obtained by killing Winter Sea Creatures

DYE_JADE.summary: Jade Dye has a 1/500,000 chance to be obtained from a Crystal Nucleus loot bundle

DYE_LIVID.summary: Livid Dye has a 1/5,000 chance of appearing in a Bedrock Chest after completing Master Mode Floor V

DYE_MANGO.summary: The player has a 0.00001% or a 1 in 10,000,000 chance of obtaining a Mango Dye from breaking any log type while in the public islandconfirm

DYE_MATCHA.summary: Matcha Dye has a chance to be obtained from defeating a Revenant Horror. Slayer Tier: I; Chance: 1/10,000,000. Slayer Tier: II; Chance: 1/2,500,000. Slayer Tier: III; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Slayer Tier: IV; Chance: 1/500,000. Slayer Tier: V; Chance: 1/250,000

DYE_MIDNIGHT.summary: Midnight Dye has a variable chance of dropping when killing Spooky Mobs

DYE_MOCHA.summary: Mocha Dye has a chance to be obtained from brewing Potions. Potion Tier: I; Chance: 1/100,000,000. Potion Tier: II; Chance: 1/5,000,000. Potion Tier: III; Chance: 1/2,500,000. Potion Tier: IV; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Potion Tier: V; Chance: 1/750,000. Potion Tier: VI; Chance: 1/500,000. Potion Tier: VII; Chance: 1/250,000. Potion Tier: VIII; Chance: 1/100,000

DYE_MYTHOLOGICAL.summary: Mythological Dye can be obtained by slaying Mythological Creatures. Mobs: Minos Hunter, Siamese Lynx,; Stranded Nymph, Cretan Bull; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Mobs: Harpy, Gaia Construct; Chance: 1/500,000. Mobs: Minotaur, Minos Champion; Chance: 1/250,000. Mobs: Sphinx, Minos Inquisitor; Chance: 1/50,000. Mobs: Manticore, King Minos; Chance: 1/10,000

DYE_NADESHIKO.summary: The player has a variable chance of obtaining a Nadeshiko Dye by completing Superpairs in the Experimentation Table | 1/75,000 chance from Supreme Experiments: 1/50,000 chance from Transcendent Experiments. | 1/75,000 chance from Supreme Experiments: 1/25,000 chance from Metaphysical Experiments

DYE_NECRON.summary: A Necron Dye has a base 0.04% chance (or 0.05% with an S+ score) of appearing in a Bedrock Post-Boss Dungeon Reward Chest in Master Mode of The Catacombs - Floor VII. The player can open the chest for 10,000,000

DYE_NYANZA.summary: Nyanza Dye has a 1/250,000 chance of appearing as a reward from Commissions

DYE_PEARLESCENT.summary: A Pearlescent Dye has a variable chance of dropping from all mobs in The End. The mobs affected, and associated drop chances, are:

DYE_PELT.summary: Pelt Dye has a chance to be obtained from slaying Trapper Animals. Animal Tier: Trackable; Chance: 1/250,000. Animal Tier: Untrackable; Chance: 1/200,000. Animal Tier: Undetected; Chance: 1/150,000. Animal Tier: Endangered; Chance: 1/100,000. Animal Tier: Elusive; Chance: 1/10,000

DYE_PERIWINKLE.summary: Periwinkle Dye has a chance to be obtained from slaying Runic Mobs. The obtainment chances scale based on the mob's Level

DYE_PURE_BLACK.summary: The player can purchase a Pure Black Dye from the Bits Shop at Elizabeth for 250,000 Bits

DYE_PURE_BLUE.summary: Pure Blue Dye is obtained from the Raffle of the Century

DYE_PURE_WHITE.summary: The player can purchase a Pure White Dye from the Bits Shop at Elizabeth for 250,000 Bits

DYE_PURE_YELLOW.summary: Pure Yellow Dye is obtained from the Raffle of the Century

DYE_SANGRIA.summary: Sangria Dye has a chance to be obtained from defeating a Riftstalker Bloodfiend. Slayer Tier: I; Chance: 1/100,000. Slayer Tier: II; Chance: 1/80,000. Slayer Tier: III; Chance: 1/60,000. Slayer Tier: IV; Chance: 1/40,000. Slayer Tier: V; Chance: 1/10,000

DYE_SECRET.summary: Secret Dye has a 1/1,000,000 chance to be obtained from Dungeon Secrets. Upon finding the dye, it will instantly be added to your inventory

DYE_SPOOKY.summary: Spooky Dye was obtainable from Taylor in the Fall 2025 Bundle. It could be purchased for 375 SkyBlock Gems

DYE_TREASURE.summary: Treasure Dye has a chance to be obtained from Fishing Treasure. Treasure Tier: GOOD; Chance: 1/1m. Treasure Tier: GREAT; Chance: 1/100k. Treasure Tier: OUTSTANDING; Chance: 1/10k

DYE_WILD_STRAWBERRY.summary: The player has a 0.000000006667% chance of obtaining a Wild Strawberry Dye from breaking any mature crop, affected by overbloom

EARTH_SHARD.summary: The Earthen Blade has a 1% chance to drop from Super Tank Zombies, which can be found between Floor IV to Floor VII

ECCENTRIC_PAINTING.summary: Eccentric Paintings are obtained from opening a Painting Bundle, which is sold at the Dark Auction for a minimum bid of 20,000,000 and when opened, give 9 Eccentric Paintings

ECCENTRIC_PAINTING_BUNDLE.summary: The Eccentric Painting Bundle has a 4.87% chance to appear in round 1, 3 or 4 of the Dark Auction. It has a starting price of 20m

ECHOLOCATOR.summary: The Echolocator can be purchased from the Fear Mongerer for 32 Green Candy during the Spooky Festival

ECTOPLASM.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 32 Ectoplasm, 4 Spooky Fragment, 1 Bat Person Talisman; Crafting recipe: Bat Person Ring

EDITOR_PENCIL.summary: The Editor's Pencil is an item rewarded to editors of the Official Hypixel Wiki who went 'above and beyond'

EERIE_TOY.summary: The Eerie Treat can be bought from the Tyashoi Alchemist for 1 Nightmare Nullifier

EERIE_TREAT.summary: The Eerie Treat can be bought from the Tyashoi Alchemist for 10 Sewer Fish

EFFICIENT_AXE.summary: The item is available to be purchased from the Lumber Merchant located in the Village for 100. Purchase: Merchant: ×1. Merchant: Lumber Merchant; Price (c): 100

EGG_HUNT.summary: Hoppity's Hunt Infobox/Item Egg Hunt, also referred to as Easter Egg, is a Common item that can be bought from Amelia. It costs 1k for 2 Egg Hunts. It can be placed on the Private Island for other players to find. Up to 10 Egg Hunts can be placed on an island after reaching 3. Only 10 eggs are recommended to be purchased at a time due to this. Each egg found gives +10 Island Points

EGG_THE_FISH.summary: Fishing in the Main Lobby during the Easter event

EINARY_RED_HOODIE.summary: Einary's Red Hoodie has a 0.04% chance to appear as Frozen Treasure

ELEANOR_CAP.summary: Helmet: Madame Eleanor Q. Goldsworth V Players must speak to Madame Eleanor Q. Goldsworth V in The Mountaintop to receive a quest, after which, they'll receive Eleanor's Cap

ESSENCE_CRIMSON.summary: Crimson Essence can be be obtained in the crimson isle in multiple ways: Opening chests from Kuudra runs. Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Crimson Essence. Increasing Crimson Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Crimson Essence gained: Icon: Rare Kuudra Pet; Name: Rare+ Kuudra Pet; Type: Pet; Effect: Gain +15%–20% more Crimson Essence. Icon: Epic Kuudra Pet. Icon: Legendary Kuudra Pet

ESSENCE_DIAMOND.summary: Diamond Essence can be be obtained in the dwarven mines, crystal hollows, and the Catacombs in multiple ways:

ESSENCE_DRAGON.summary: Dragon Essence can be be obtained in the end and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Sacrificing specific items to the Draconic Altar.

ESSENCE_FOREST.summary: Forest Essence can be be obtained in galatea in multiple ways: Tree Gifts Starlyn Contests Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Forest Essence. Increasing Forest Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Forest Essence gained: Icon: Dreadwing Shard; Name: Essence of the Forest; Type: Attribute; Effect: Gain +1%–13% more Forest Essence. Icon: Komodo Dragon Shard; Name: Echo of Essence. Icon: Tiamat Shard; Name: Echo of Echoes

ESSENCE_FOSSIL.summary: Fossil Essence can be be obtained in the glacite tunnels and glacite mineshafts in multiple ways: Fossil Excavator Mining Fossils (which appear as Quartz blocks, stairs, and slabs) in Glacite Mineshafts, rewarding 4-8 each. Collecting Dr. Stone's rewards. Collecting Fossil Muncher's rewards. Salvaging certain items

ESSENCE_GOLD.summary: Gold Essence can be be obtained in the dwarven mines, crystal hollows, and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Opening Crystal Hollows Treasure Chests. Completing the Crystal Nucleus. Dungeon Secret Chests Killing Watcher Undeads with the Golden modifier in the Catacombs. Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Gold Essence. Unlocking Golden Heads. Unlocking Marigold's Shop. Trading with Gold Forger and Marigold visitors in The Garden. Mob Drops: Drop Sources

ESSENCE_ICE.summary: Ice Essence can be be obtained in jerry's workshop and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Dungeon Secret Chests Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Ice Essence.

ESSENCE_SPIDER.summary: Spider Essence can be be obtained in arachne's burrow and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Spider Essence.

ESSENCE_SUN_GECKO.summary: Sun Gecko Essence can be obtained in the mountaintop by defeating Sun Gecko

ESSENCE_UNDEAD.summary: Undead Essence can be be obtained in the dungeon hub and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Dungeon Reward Chests Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Undead Essence. Mob Drops: Drop Sources Increasing Undead Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Undead Essence gained: Icon: Revenant Shard; Name: Essence of Unliving; Type: Attribute; Effect: Gain +1%–13% more Undead Essence. Icon: Komodo Dragon Shard; Name: Echo of Essence. Icon: Tiamat Shard; Name: Echo of Echoes

ESSENCE_WITHER.summary: Wither Essence can be be obtained in the dungeon hub and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Dungeon Reward Chests Dungeon Secrets Dungeon Hub Race reward from Guildford. Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Wither Essence. Increasing Wither Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Wither Essence gained: Icon: Wither Shard; Name: Essence of Wither; Type: Attribute; Effect: Gain +1%–13% more Wither Essence. Icon: Komodo Dragon Shard; Name: Echo of Essence. Icon: Tiamat Shard; Name: Echo of Echoes

EXPLOSIVE_ARROW.summary: Additionally, multiple types of arrows exist: special arrows can be purchased from Jax in the Archery Range, requiring higher levels of Target Practice completed to purchase better arrows. These cannot be removed from the Quiver. Jax also sells the Arrow Swapper, which allows the player to swap the type of arrows that are consumed in the Quiver

FAKE_SHURIKEN.summary: 16x Extremely Real Shuriken can be obtained for 32x Sun Gecko Essence from Oruo The Almighty

FALLEN_STAR_HAT.summary: A Fallen Star Helmet can be obtained by talking to the Cult of the Fallen Star in their cave in the Cliffside Veins. The cult only appears between 12a.m. (Midnight, 00h, start of the 7th/14th/21st/28th day) until 6:00a.m. in in-game time every 7 SkyBlock days (7th, 14th, 21st, and 28th of each SkyBlock Month)

FORAGING_FORTUNE_BOOSTER.summary: A Foraging Fortune Booster can be bought from Sawyer for 50k

FORAGING_WISDOM_BOOSTER.summary: A Foraging Wisdom Booster can be obtained from Tree Gifts with a 0.5% from fig trees and 0.8% from mangrove trees

FORGE_PORTAL.summary: Crafting: To craft a portal, the player must first unlock its recipe as a Collection reward. The recipe will always require 16 Ender Pearls in the middle and 16 of each specified items around it

FORGE_TRAVEL_SCROLL.summary: Forging ; /Travel Scroll to the Dwarven Forge/

FOUL_FLESH.summary: Foul Flesh is a occ drop from II, III, IV and V Revenant Horrors

FOUR_EYED_FISH.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: *384 Enchanted Spider Eye *1 Lucky Clover *1 Reinforced Scales *1 Pre-Digestion Fish; Crafting recipe: Four-Eyed Fish

FRACTURED_MITHRIL_PICKAXE.summary: A Fractured Mithril Pickaxe can be purchased from Bubu for 10k

FRAMED_VOLCANIC_STONEFISH.summary: The Framed Volcanic Stonefish can only be obtained while completing Odexar's Quest. The player must bring Odexar's Volcanic Stonefish to Odger, who tells them to fish up another Volcanic Stonefish. Once the player brings another Volcanic Stonefish to Odger, he will give the player a Framed Volcanic Stonefish

FREE_SPIDER.summary: A Free Spider can be obtained by hitting the iron bars containing the Trapped Spiders in the Spiders Den house with a Scavenged Iron Hammer, which can be obtained by combining a Scavenged Golden Hammer and Scavenged Emerald Hammer in an Anvil in the Gold Mine

FREE_WILL.summary: Free Will is obtained from Ubik's Averages by being among the 10% of players closest to half of the average. Picking a value 4x higher than the average will reward the player with 2 Free Will

FRENCH_BREAD.summary: The French Bread was only obtainable by defeating Bonzo or Scarf on the Alpha Hypixel Network during testing, and it was delivered to the player's personal island via Jerry

FRENCH_FRIES.summary: French Fries are created by a Potato Minion when a Hunter Knife is in one of its upgrade slots

FRESHLY_BAKED_RELIC.summary: A Freshly Baked Relic can be bought from Feast Baker Scott for 500 and 1 Freshly Baked Artifact

FRESHLY_BAKED_RING.summary: A Freshly Baked Ring can be bought from Feast Baker Scott for 100 and 1 Freshly Baked Talisman

FRESHLY_BAKED_TALISMAN.summary: A Freshly Baked Talisman can be bought from Feast Baker Scott for 25

FROG_MASK.summary: The Frog Mask can be purchased from Doug for 2000

GLYPH_CONCLAMATUS.summary: The Conclamatus Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Pernimius Glyph, then opening the chest at -168.5 in the barn within the Dreadfarm. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_FIRMITAS.summary: The Firmitas Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Robur Glyph, then opening the chest at -85.5 in the Cake House. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_FORTIS.summary: The Fortis Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbueing the Validus Glyph, then opening the chest at -148.5 in the windmill within the Dreadfarm. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_PERNIMIUS.summary: The Pernimius Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbueing the Fortis Glyph, then opening the chest at -148.5 by the water tower within the Dreadfarm. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_POTENTIA.summary: The Potentia Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Robur Glyph, then opening the chest in a server room at -14.5 within the West Village. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_ROBUR.summary: The Robur Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Vis Glyph, then opening the chest at -93.5 on top of the Infested House's chimney. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_VALIDUS.summary: The Validus Glyph can be obtained by starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and then opening the chest at -95.5 by the pond in the West Village. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_VIS.summary: The Vis Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Conclamatus Glyph, then opening the chest at -99.5 by Joey McPizza and Chef within the West Village. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GREEN_CANDY.summary: Mob Drops: Drop Sources Helping kill a Headless Horseman can also grant Green Candy. Additionally, Bat Piñatas will drop Green Candy when flying around, which can be found randomly during the Spooky Festival or spawned from a Bat Firework

GREEN_GIFT.summary: Gift Locations: Every SkyBlock Year, the player can speak to St. Jerry to obtain a Green Gift after claiming all 20 White Gifts across Jerry's Workshop

GREEN_GIFT_TALISMAN.summary: Purchase: The Green Gift Talisman can be purchased from Einary at Einary's Emporium in Jerry's Workshop

GREENHOUSE_BLUEPRINT.summary: The Greenhouse Blueprint is given by the Carpenter after serving them for the first time in The Garden

GUNTHER_SNEAKERS.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 1 Gunthesizer Lichen, 8 Shadow Crux, 1 Wyld Boots; Crafting Recipe: Gunther's Sneakers

HALLOWED_SKULL.summary: A Hallowed Skull is a guaranteed drop from Bladesoul if the player has dealt at least 1,000,000

HAMSTER_WHEEL.summary: Infobox/Minion fuel The Hamster Wheel is a Rare Minion Fuel that is an occasional drop from the Sven Packmaster at 2 or higher. It boosts the speed of a Minion by 50% for 1 day

HANDY_BLOOD_CHALICE.summary: A Handy Blood Chalice has a Pray RNGesus chance to drop from Voidgloom Seraph IV if the player has Enderman Slayer LVL 5. It has a 0.18% (1/566.76) chance to drop

HAPPY_MASK.summary: The Happy Mask is an Uncommon helmet which could be purchased from Dante for 100. It allowed the player to access Official Buildings when Dante was the elected mayor

HARD_GLASS.summary: Crafting: Requirement: Sand VII; Ingredients: 1 Enchanted Sand, 8 Coal; Crafting Recipe: Hard Glass

HARD_STONE.summary: Hard Stone can be obtained by mining Stone blocks in the Crystal Hollows, Glacite Tunnels, or Glacite Mineshafts (or or Cyan Hardened Clay blocks in the Crystal Hollows) using a Pickaxe, Gauntlet, or Drill with a Breaking Power of at least 4

HARDENED_WOOD.summary: Brining an Oasis Sheep to Jake

HARMONIOUS_SURGERY_TOOLKIT.summary: The Harmonious Surgery Toolkit is unlocked in the Argofay Bugshopper's shop once the player has purchased a Larva Hook from them

HAZMAT_ENDERMAN.summary: The Hazmat Enderman is an e drop from the 3 Voidgloom Seraph or above if the player has Enderman Slayer LVL 4

HEADLESS_PERSONALITY.summary: Bought as part of a bundle during Black Friday 2025

HEAVY_PEARL.summary: The Matriarch: Heavy Pearls can be obtained by collecting them from The Matriarch's stomach, located in the Matriarch's Lair, without getting digested. There are three piles of Heavy Pearls in the Belly of the Beast, which the player must click several times to obtain them. Whilst being in the Belly of the Beast, hp is set to 100, and all potion effects are removed. Under normal circumstances, 3 Heavy Pearls can be obtained per real-life day, all of which can be in the same run

HEGEMONY_ARTIFACT.summary: The Hegemony Artifact can be purchased from the Darker Auction when Scorpius is mayor. It has a minimum price of 1m

Killing a Hidden Jerry drops a Jerry Box corresponding to its rarity. There is a 6 minute cooldown after finding a Hidden Jerry before another one will spawn

KING_TALISMAN.summary: The King Talisman is obtained after speaking to all seven Kings while they are the active king. The active king changes every SkyBlock Day. Every time the player speaks to a unique king, a progress number will appear in the chat. Once all seven kings have been spoken to, the talisman will automatically appear in the player's inventory, and the player will recieve the A Royal Meeting. Once unlocked, you can buy it from Rusty for 500,000 Coins

KISMET_FEATHER.summary: The Kismet Feather can be bought from Elizabeth for 1350 Bits

Right-Clicking -880 inside Blazing Volcano on Crimson Isle with any Drill during a Cataclysmic volcanic eruption, a menu opens for claiming the Kuudra Relic. The player must reach the Heart of the Mountain level requirement of the drill

LIVING_METAL.summary: Living Metal can be obtained by mining the Lapis Ore in the Living Cave using a Self-Recursive Pickaxe. After 1 block is mined, another will appear adjacent to the mined block. If the player continues to mine blocks, they will gain a multiplier on the amount of Living Metal they receive. Every 10 blocks mined increases the multiplier by 1, starting from 1x, up to 5x. 3 seconds after the player stops mining blocks, or when they reach 5x multiplier, it will be reset and the player will receive the Living Metal they mined. The player will receive 20x Living Metal at a 5x multiplier

OLD_FRAGMENT.summary: Lost Adventurers: Young Dragon Fragment!Young, Unstable Dragon Fragment!Unstable, Superior Dragon Fragment!Superior, and Holy Dragon Fragment!Holy Fragments can also be obtained by killing Lost Adventurers equipped with the respective Dragon Armor in Dungeons. This is the only way to obtain Holy Dragon Fragments. 1-3 Dragon Fragments are dropped by Lost Adventurers wearing Young, Unstable, or Holy Dragon Armor, and 1-2 Dragon Fragments are dropped by Lost Adventurers wearing Superior Dragon Armor

OLD_LEATHER_BOOT.summary: An Old Leather Boot can be obtained as an &d&lOUTSTANDING &2&lJUNK &d&lCATCH by fishing with a Junk Sinker applied to a Fishing Rod

OMEGA_EGG.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Raw Chicken X; Ingredients: 9 Super Enchanted Egg; Crafting Recipe: Omega Enchanted Egg

ONYX.summary: The Black Diamond can be purchased from the Mining Merchant in The Hub for 100

ONYX_CRYSTAL.summary: Gemstone Crystals are collectibles obtained from special tasks within the Crystal Hollows and also within certain Glacite Mineshafts

OOPS_THE_FISH.summary: Fishing in the Main Lobby during the Summer event

ORANGE_CHESTPLATE.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Half-Eaten Carrot II; Ingredients: 448 Half-Eaten Carrot, 1 etalptsehC norI; Crafting Recipe: Orange Chestplate

ORNATE_ZOMBIE_SWORD.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 1 Zombie Sword, 1 Golden Powder, 1 Enchanted Gold Block; Crafting recipe: Ornate Zombie Sword

OVERCLOCKER_3000.summary: An Overclocker 3000 can be obtained across various activities in The Garden: Trading with Visitors. Rewarded from Jacob's Farming Contests. Dropped from Crops. Dropped from the Greenhouse. Dropped from Pests

OVERDRIVE_GARDEN_CHIP.summary: Rarely obtained from completing Visitor Offers (2%)

OVERFLUX_CAPACITOR.summary: An Overflux Capacitor can drop from the 4 Sven Packmaster if the player has reached Wolf Slayer LVL 7. It has a 0.0385% (approximately 1/2,597) base chance to drop from the boss

OVERFLUX_POWER_ORB.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Wolf Slayer LVL 7; Ingredients: 1 Mana Flux Power Orb, 1 Overflux Capacitor, 128 Golden Tooth, 24 Enchanted Redstone Block; Crafting recipe: Overflux Power Orb

OXFORD_SHOES.summary: Each piece of Seymour's Special Armor is given to the player by Seymour as a reward for completing his offer in The Garden. Each piece will have a random color when given to the player

PAINT_CARTRIDGE.summary: A Paint Drying Simulator can be obtained as a Minor Reward during Raffle of the Century event, or from the Gift Bag of the Century

PAINTERS_PALETTE.summary: A Painter's Palette is rewarded to the player once they contribute to the Artist's Abode City Project at least 20 times. The player's name, number of contributions, along with the date it was obtained and edition number, will be displayed in the item's lore

PANDORAS_BOX.summary: Pandora's Box appears on Shen's Auction, and can be won if the player is one of the top 40 bidders on the item when the auction ends

PARKOUR_POINT.summary: Infobox/Block Parkour Checkpoint is a block that can be placed on the Private Island. It can be bought from Amelia for 1000, and requires 1 to purchase or place

PARROT_MASK.summary: The Parrot Mask can be purchased from Doug for 1000

PARTY_GIFT.summary: Party Gifts can be obtained by killing Winter Sea Creatures or participating in the Defend Jerry's Workshop event while Foxy is mayor or minister with the A Time for Giving perk. Sea Creature Rarity: Common; Drop Chance: 2%. Sea Creature Rarity: Uncommon; Drop Chance: 5%. Sea Creature Rarity: Rare; Drop Chance: 10%. Sea Creature Rarity: Epic; Drop Chance: 20%. Sea Creature Rarity: Legendary; Drop Chance: 40%

RAIDER_AXE.summary: The Raider Sword can be purchased from the Joyful Viking for 130k once his quest is completed

RAMPART_BOOTS.summary: Mob Drops: Pieces of Rampart Armor have a chance to be dropped from mobs in the Stronghold and Crimson Fields on the Crimson Isle. Rampart Armor Piece

RARE_DIAMOND.summary: The Rare Diamond can be obtained by mining Diamond Ore or Diamond Blocks in the Deep Caverns. They have a 0.2% chance to drop a Rare Diamond when mined

RARE_KUUDRA_CHUNK.summary: Kuudra Chunk can be obtained from the Kuudra collection. Name: Kuudra Chunk; Collection: Kuudra II. Name: Meaty Kuudra Chunk; Collection: Kuudra III. Name: Hardened Kuudra Chunk; Collection: Kuudra IV. Name: Enriched Kuudra Chunk; Collection: Kuudra V

RAREFINDER_GARDEN_CHIP.summary: Rarely drops from farming crops (0.00015%) confirm

RAT_JETPACK.summary: The Rat Jetpack is sometimes sold in the Regalia Room. It can be purchased for 50m. Entering Regalia Room requires Shen's Regalia

RAW_FISH.summary: Fishing: Raw Cod can be fished from any water source block available. It is the most common item in the Fishing Collection. When caught, Raw Cod grants +25 Fishing

RAW_FISH-2.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Tropical Fish 1; Ingredients: 8 Tropical Fish; Crafting recipe: Tropical Fish Hat

RAW_FISH-3.summary: Minions: Pufferfish can be obtained from Fishing Minions

RAW_SOULFLOW.summary: Raw Soulflow can be obtained every 3.6 minutes (216 seconds) with the Lesser Soulflow Engine in any minion equipped, this production is not affected by minion speed. This is the unique way of getting it at the moment together with Soulflow Engine

RAY_OF_HELIOS.summary: A Ray of Helios has a 0.0000002% chance to be obtained from harvesting in-season crops during the Harvest Feast

RECALL_POTION.summary: The Recall Potion can be obtained from the treasure bundle that is spawned after placing all Gemstone Crystals in the Crystal Nucleus. It has a 0.08244159% chance to be rolled for each drop in the treasure bundle

RECLUSE_FANG.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Spider Slayer 2; Ingredients: 1 Spider Sword, 16 Tarantula Web, 1 Spider Catalyst; Crafting recipe: Recluse Fang

RED_BELT.summary: The Red Belt was obtained by failing any Dojo challenge

REDSTONE_TIPPED_ARROW.summary: Additionally, multiple types of arrows exist: special arrows can be purchased from Jax in the Archery Range, requiring higher levels of Target Practice completed to purchase better arrows. These cannot be removed from the Quiver. Jax also sells the Arrow Swapper, which allows the player to swap the type of arrows that are consumed in the Quiver

REED_BOAT.summary: The Rift Boat can be purchased from Reed for 25,000 after completing all 5 steps, meaning the raw cost also involves the following materials: 16 Larva Silk 64 Wilted Berberis 128 Half-Eaten Carrots 1 Living Metal Anchor 8 Bacte Fragments

REFINED_DIAMOND.summary: The Refined Diamond can be forged once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain 2. It requires 2x Enchanted Diamond Blocks and 8 hours to forge. Forging Tree: /Refined Diamond/

REFINED_MINERAL.summary: Refined Minerals can be obtained from mining Ores and Dwarven Metals on public islands during the Mining Fiesta event. The drop chance is \frac{\text{BlockBreakingPower}}{2000} per ore. This can be increased by up to 10% by unlocking Refined Mind V at Doug

REFINED_MITHRIL.summary: Refined Mithril can be forged in The Forge once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain 2. It requires 160 Enchanted Mithril and 6 hours to forge

REFINED_MITHRIL_PICKAXE.summary: The Mithril Pickaxe can be purchased from Bubu for 1x Mithril Pickaxe and 2x Refined Mithril once the player has reached 3

REFINED_TITANIUM.summary: Refined Titanium can be forged once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain 2. It requires 16 Enchanted Titanium and 12 hours to forge

REFINED_TITANIUM_PICKAXE.summary: A Polished Titanium Pickaxe can be purchased from Bubu for 1x Titanium Pickaxe and 1x Refined Titanium once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain 4. The Titanium Pickaxe used to purchase a Polished Titanium Pickaxe will keep all of its modifiers

REFINED_TUNGSTEN.summary: Refined Tungsten can be forged once the player has reached Tungsten 3 and Heart of the Mountain 7. It requires 160 Enchanted Tungsten and 1 hour to forge

REFINED_UMBER.summary: Refined Umber can be forged once the player has reached Umber 3 and Heart of the Mountain 7. It requires 160 Enchanted Umber and 1 hour to forge

REFORGE_ANVIL.summary: Merchant: A Reforge Anvil could be bought from the Smithmonger for 2000000. One could be purchased every SkyBlock Year

REFUND_COOKIE.summary: A Booster Cookie can be purchased from the Community Shop for 325

REHEATED_GUMMY_POLAR_BEAR.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Chili Pepper I; Ingredients: 4 Chili Pepper, 4 Enchanted Snow Block, 16 Enchanted Slimeball; Crafting recipe: Re-heated Gummy Polar Bear

REINFORCED_CHISEL.summary: A Reinforced Chisel can be forged once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain VII. It takes 30 seconds to forge

RIBBIT_THE_FISH.summary: Ribbit the Fish is obtained by getting the Master Frog Collector title, which can be obtained by fishing up every Trophy Frog on the Lotus Atoll. It can be claimed from Researcher Ribery after reaching the requirements. If lost, it can be bought from Researcher Ribery for 1m after reaching the milestone

RICH_CHOCOLATE_CHUNK.summary: Purchase: A Smooth Chocolate Bar can be purchased from the Chocolate Shop, found in the Chocolate Factory. Merchant: Chocolate Shop; Price: Smooth Chocolate Bar; 2b

RIFT_BUCKET.summary: A Plumber's Bucket can be purchased from Plumber Joe (Rift) in the Rift Dimension for 1,000

RIFT_JUMP_ELIXIR.summary: The Jump Elixir can be purchased from Shifted for 5 Shy Cruxes and 5,000

RIFT_NECKLACE_INSIDE.summary: A Mythic Rift Necklace can be claimed from Elise (Rift) inside the Rift Dimension after placing a Supreme Timecharm in the Rift Gallery. Once the player has claimed their necklace inside the Rift, they can talk to Elise in the Wizard Tower and selecting the keyword &6&lCARAMEL to receive a Legendary Rift Necklace

RIFT_NECKLACE_OUTSIDE.summary: A Mythic Rift Necklace can be claimed from Elise (Rift) inside the Rift Dimension after placing a Supreme Timecharm in the Rift Gallery. Once the player has claimed their necklace inside the Rift, they can talk to Elise in the Wizard Tower and selecting the keyword &6&lCARAMEL to receive a Legendary Rift Necklace

RIFT_PRISM.summary: The Rift Prism can be bid on at Barrier Street. The top 25 bidders win the item

RIFT_SPEED_ELIXIR.summary: The Speed Elixir can be purchased from Shifted for 5 Shy Cruxes and 10,000

RIFT_STABILITY_ELIXIR.summary: The Stability Elixir can be obtained from the Argofay Serialbather after speaking to Inverted Sirius and a variety of NPCs in the Shifted Tavern

RIFT_STRENGTH_ELIXIR.summary: The Strength Elixir can be purchased from Shifted for 5 Shy Cruxes and 12,000

RIFT_TROPHY_CHICKEN_N_EGG.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 1 Caducous Stem Bunch, 8 Metaphoric Egg, 1 Agaricus Cap Bunch, 1 Proto-Chicken, 2 Wilted Berberis Bunch; Crafting recipe: Chicken N Egg Timecharm

RIFT_TROPHY_CITIZEN.summary: The player can purchase a SkyBlock Citizen Timecharm from the Old Election Box in Barry HQ for 16 Scribe Crux and 1 Barry's Montgray Pen after helping Barry with all the protestors

RIFT_TROPHY_LAZY_LIVING.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 20 Frosty Crux, 160 Living Metal; Crafting recipe: Living Timecharm

RIFT_TROPHY_MOUNTAIN.summary: The Celestial Timecharm can be obtained from Shen Citrinitas after completing the third sequence in Cerebral Citadel

RIFT_TROPHY_SLIME.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 20 Shy Crux, 8 Bacte Fragment; Crafting recipe: Globulate Timecharm

RIFT_TROPHY_VAMPIRIC.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 6 Bloodbadge, 3 Wilted Berberis Bunch; Crafting recipe: Vampiric Timecharm

RIFT_TROPHY_WYLDLY_SUPREME.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 4 Leech Supreme Fragment, 32 Lil' Pad, 4 Bottled Odonata, 24 Deadgehog Spine; Crafting recipe: Supreme Timecharm

RIFTWART_ROOTS.summary: Riftwart Roots can be harvested with a Wand of Farming outside the Alchemist's in the West Village in the Rift Dimension. After breaking Riftwart Roots, the Nether Wart will decrease by 1 stage, and the player's head will be rotated in a random direction. After the Riftwart Roots are broken 3 times, it will be destroyed and the player can collect it

RING_OF_BROKEN_LOVE.summary: Once obtained, it can be re-purchased from Detective Amog

RING_OF_COINS.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 4 Freshly-Minted Coins, 1 Talisman of Coins; Crafting Recipe: Ring of Coins

RING_OF_ETERNAL_LOVE.summary: The Ring of Eternal Love can be obtained from Joliet after solving Detective Amog's second reverse-murder case

RITUAL_RESIDUE.summary: Ritual Residue has a 10.84% chance to be obtained from sacrificing a piece of Dragon Armor and a 10.59% from sacrificing an Aspect of the Dragons at the Draconic Altar

ROBOTRON_REFLECTOR.summary: Crafting: Name: Precursor Apparatus; Ingredients: 1 Control Switch, 1 Electron Transmitter, 1 FTX 3070, 1 Robotron Reflector, 1 Superlite Motor, 1 Synthetic Heart; Crafting recipe: Precursor Apparatus

ROCK_CANDY.summary: Rock Candy can be obtained during the Spooky Festival as a Green chance drop from Trick or Treat Chests

ROCK_GEMSTONE.summary: The Dwarven Geode can be forged once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain 3. It requires 128x Enchanted Cobblestone, 64x Treasurite, and 6 hours to forge. Forging Tree: /Dwarven Geode/

ROCK_THE_FISH.summary: Dark Monoliths in the Dwarven Mines

ROD_OF_THE_SEA.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 4 Great White Shark Tooth, 4 Enchanted Shark Fin, 1 Rod of Legends; Crafting recipe: Rod of the Sea

SNOW_BLASTER.summary: Frosty the Snow Blaster can be purchased for 75000 by interacting with Sherry. It is initially empty

SNOW_CANNON.summary: Frosty the Snow Cannon can be obtained by talking to Frosty on Jerry's Workshop. More can be purchased for 1000 by interacting with Frosty without the original item in the player's inventory, or by using the command /opencannonbuymenu. It is initially completely filled with 1000 Snowballs

If the minion upgrade Soulflow Engine is used, the Raw Soulflow output of the upgrade is increased by 3% per minion level
